context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements browse abandonment with debounce logic and either the custom BullMQ flow or the Klaviyo Track API integration, including correct event properties, payload structure, and the anonymous visitor gate.

checklist.name: 30-minute trigger delay
checklist.description: The browse abandonment first email is scheduled with a 30-minute delay (1800000ms or 30*60000) from the product view event

checklist.name: Debounce: remove existing job
checklist.description: Before scheduling a new browse-abandon job for a customer, any previously queued browse-abandon step-0 job for that customer is removed/cancelled

checklist.name: Browse abandon 2 steps
checklist.description: The browse abandonment flow schedules exactly 2 email steps

checklist.name: Step 1 delay is 25 hours
checklist.description: The second browse-abandon email (step 1) is scheduled 25 hours after the product view (90000000ms or 25*3600000), NOT 24 hours

checklist.name: Step 1 includes withReviews
checklist.description: The step 1 (second) browse abandonment email payload includes withReviews: true

checklist.name: 4 related products
checklist.description: The browse abandonment payload fetches or requests exactly 4 related products (getRelatedProducts or equivalent called with count=4)

checklist.name: Anonymous visitor gate
checklist.description: The browse abandonment trigger is gated on a known/authenticated customer ID — the code checks that the customer is identified (logged in or has captured email) before scheduling, or documents this requirement

checklist.name: Klaviyo package import
checklist.description: If Klaviyo integration is implemented, imports from 'klaviyo-api' (ApiClient, EventsApi, EventCreateQueryV2) — does NOT use a generic fetch/axios call or unofficial SDK

checklist.name: Klaviyo auth setup
checklist.description: If Klaviyo is used, the API key is set via ApiClient.instance.authentications['Klaviyo-API-Key'].apiKey

checklist.name: Klaviyo Viewed Product properties
checklist.description: If Klaviyo is used, the 'Viewed Product' event includes all six properties: ProductName, ProductID, Categories, ImageURL, URL, Price

checklist.name: Cancel browse-abandon on cart
checklist.description: An onCartItemAdded (or equivalent) function removes all pending browse-abandon jobs for the customer when they add to cart
